_meta.description: Phase 4 v3 testnet deploy artifacts (plan-008 U5 + D-032). Model3D is now a SHARED object (publish); the L1 Kiosk path is removed, so there is NO TransferPolicy<Model3D>. The only TransferPolicy is for the L2 NftToken (Kiosk-traded ownership) — the generic `transfer_policy_id` / `transfer_policy_cap_id` fields now hold THAT policy. Field names kept generic for frontend-config stability (networkConfig.ts parity); U6 may rename to *_nfttoken_* when collectionTxBuilders.ts lands. Frontend pins the policy_id from here so confirm_request resolves the canonical policy. Per D-009: testnet is the 6/21 submission target; mainnet ceremony deferred to the 8/27 prize window.
_meta.package_version: v3 (Phase 4, D-032 — Model3D shared, Kiosk only on NftToken)
_meta.kiosk_apps_package_id_discovery: Re-confirmed at v3 by reading the deployed TransferPolicy<NftToken> rules VecSet — all three rule TypeNames (royalty_rule, kiosk_lock_rule, personal_kiosk_rule) live under 0xe308bb3e…, unchanged from v2 (deps pinned identically). Frontend MUST use the address pinned here, NOT the @mysten/kiosk SDK defaults — otherwise confirm_request fails the rule membership check.
